pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a release compatible with Java 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not fully support the 'release' flag or Java 11 toolchains correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for Java 11+ and ensures API compatibility with the target version, replacing the deprecated source/target approach.
